hotel_name: Clearwater Beach Sheraton Resort on Sand Key

reviews.title: Expensive
reviews.text: This hotel is old, but the price is very high. There is no activities in the private beach. All the outside is in dark after 7pm. However, the water is clear, and shallow, which is good for small children to swim.

reviews.title: Will not do it again
reviews.positives:
Not welcome staff
You need t rent chairs and umbrella 
Very disappointed

reviews.title: Be wary when they tell you private beach
reviews.text:
The hotel was lovely. Personally I don think it was worth the money. Two things to be wary of. Yes you have a private part of the beach but it’s a bit of a walk down to the beach but they do provide a buggy to take you down but you have to pay for your beds any umbrellas $40 for two beds. Also when booking through a third party like agoda etc don’t get free wi fi!!!! 
Personally I was slightly disappointed. Our usual accommodation we stay in was booked up. It was much cheaper with free wifi and free sun beds. I probably wouldn’t stay in this hotel again.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Nothing was well at all as I book a beach front room I did not get what I pay for
reviews.negatives: Get what I pay for

reviews.title: Nice place away from public!
reviews.text: Great hotel, staff and grounds. However due to it being an older hotel it is very noisy. Heard people talking in hallway clearly, sliding balcony doors on various floors it was very disappointing. If you have kids the place is excellent, much to do on grounds. If you are a couple and want quiet rooms, this may not be the place for you.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 1 King, Partial gulf view, Balcony

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.positives: Our grouper sandwich and breakfast were very good
reviews.negatives:
The facility is old, outdated, and under renovation, with the working noise intolerable. Not recommended for the next couple of years.
Also the beach is so far away a cart is needed to get there-not “on the beach “ as advertised ☹️

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: We enjoyed our vacation at Sheraton Sand Key. The location is great and the beds are amazing! The staff keeps the hotel nice and clean at all times. We definitely recommend.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: It was clean
reviews.negatives:
I booked for a balcony with view 
2 queens beds. I was placed in a room with one king bed and no view. I was able to change rooms to get 2 queens.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Awesome hotel. Would definitely stay again

reviews.title: Paid a lot money, vacation us interrupted with noisy guests!
reviews.negatives: The room was just ok, the room next to us where very noisy kept us up two nights with noise going until 2-3 am , the third night the alarm went off in that same room 6 am it was blaring had get housekeeping to turn it off!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Queen, Resort view, Balcony

reviews.title: Very bad weekend
reviews.positives: It was in a nice area.
reviews.negatives: It was under construction the whole time we were there. Sitting by the pool was loud and dust from the construction was coming down into the pool area. The tennis courts on the photos are beautiful but are not usable because they have about 20 semi trailers with all the construction equipment parked on the tennis courts. The private beach wasn’t limited to hotel guests the weekend we were there because they had a volleyball tournament with 1000 people coming to the beach that wasn’t staying their. It was loud and noisy from construction and the tournament so didn’t get one day of peace and quiet at all.

reviews.title: Best beach resort in Clearwater
reviews.text: This is the only major resort in Clearwater with a private beach and it is a very nice property with all the amenities.  The free trolley has a stop at this hotel which is important even if you have a car as there is very limited parking along the strip. We drove the other way to go to restaurants by the end of our stay to avoid the congestion and that was a nice option. The location of the Sheraton Sand Key is the best.

reviews.title: Don't waste your money
reviews.positives: Staff was very knowledgeable.
reviews.negatives: Hotel is under heavy construction, which is not mentioned on the website. There are no tennis pickleball courts or beach tennis as shown on website.. The shuttle to the beach is non-existent. The gym and spa are located at the Marriott across the road. Don't waste your money. 775.00 for 2 nights with fees and  no complimentary breakfast.

reviews.title: I would book directly through the hotel next time and avoidbooking.com completely
reviews.positives: The pool and Jacuzzi was nice. The hotel had golf carts that would take you to the beach area because the beach is about 300 yards from the hotel.
reviews.negatives: The property that booking.com advertised that I booked was not as indicated the pictures that I saw on the booking showed the room to have a loveseat and much bigger. The room was very small and cramped. The bathroom was small. The comforter on the bed was stained with urine or something that was spilled on there. The dining facility inside smelled like dead fish.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Beach private, excellent staff, nice rooms. 3 places to eat.  All food and drinks great.
reviews.negatives: Need more outdoor bars, needs to stay open later. Needs bigger food menus.

reviews.title: Not what I expected for the price
reviews.positives: Old bar soap left from previous guest
reviews.negatives: Staff wasn’t nice or timely

reviews.title: I just felt cheated by the price
reviews.positives: Staff at front desk very friendly. Check in was easy
reviews.negatives:
I was attending a major event. I tried to make reservations for that over the weekend. Special event staff not available. I read that there were only 4-5 rooms left on Booking.com. So, I went ahead and booked. I learned on Monday that the price I paid was more than double the event price.

The price was very high considering most all the amenities were closed due to the storm. 

The bathroom was miniscule. The smallest I have ever had except in Tokyo.

reviews.title: Probably will look elsewhere if I were to return to the area.
reviews.positives: Location. Friendly staff
reviews.negatives: 1st floor smelled old and musty. No free breakfast. Expensive drinks in bar. Small pool area, very crowded

reviews.title: It was okay.
reviews.positives: The beach was too far from location.  The photo that is shown on the website is deceiving.
reviews.negatives: It was too expensive for the location because there others closer to the beach and cheaper.  I will never stay in your hotel.

reviews.title: It was good just didn't realize the place would be covered in mold
reviews.positives: Yes did not eat there it was kinda expensive. Location was great
reviews.negatives: The 1st was great. The 2nd night our room lost power on one side. Then I noticed there was black mold on the ceiling in the bathroom and the sink area. I took pictures and notified the on call employee the morning of check out.

reviews.title: Wish we would not have been charged for parking since the other amenities were not available.
reviews.positives: The staff were great… The location was great…The beach is great. Pillows were fine.
reviews.negatives: Understand why there is a parking charge because we were told locals would fill a lot if there was no charge… But $25 a night for parking is excessive given it is a resort and we’re paying resort level fees for the rooms. The charge for lounge, chairs and umbrellas on the beach is also excessive and seems like these amenities should be included in the resort. Other than that, and we realize it was because of the hurricane, we did not have a swimming pool and outside bar or restaurant the whole time we were there, which was some of the resort level things we were looking forward to when we booked the resort.

reviews.title: 4th of July celebration
reviews.positives: Golf cart, restaurants
reviews.negatives: Cost

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Room was very dirty. Also there was cocroach in the room on the curtains. Staff didn't suggest to change the room . But suggest free breakfast. Staff is not friendly. I assume in Florida cocroach is normal.  But beach is great and location is great.

reviews.title: Good location but disappointing beach amenities
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Private beach supposed to be good attraction, however there is a 3rd party to provide services with extra money which i did not like

reviews.title: Nice location, clean but it needs some renovation
reviews.positives: Beach was nice , The room was spacious .
reviews.negatives: The view from the balcony very bad . A dirty roof

reviews.title: It was just ok
reviews.positives: The pool setting was beautiful, it had a nice little kids area with games
reviews.negatives: Our room was insanely small.  The Holiday inn we stayed in the night before was 2X the size. There isn’t a continental breakfast.  There wasn’t a microwave in the room.  We have a kiddo with food allergies and eating issues, so we brought food for him.  We couldn’t warm it unless we went downstairs and asked them to do it at the front desk.  The staff was extremely kind and helpful.  Our room was very clean as was the pool.  The beach was an extremely far walk to get to the water, but a little cart will take you down.  The restaurants are good but pricy.   Overall it was ok.

reviews.title: It was okay since I like the staff and the room was spacious and beds are comfortable.
reviews.positives: Clean, location and the rooms space is good.
reviews.negatives: We have no access to the beach because of Idalia.  The fitness center was closed.  The fridge is too small and there is no microwave in the room. The extra bed is not comfortable at all. They should have adjusted the price of the room since we chose this hotel because of these reasons.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Away from the chaos of Clearwater beach
reviews.negatives: Long walk to the beach

reviews.title: The hotel is being renovated and this was our 2nd stay. We would stay here again in the future. The location can’t be be
reviews.positives: Love the location and the trolley stop outside the hotel was convenient. Comfy beds and great pool and beach area.
reviews.negatives: Small room (double queen),Super small bathroom (not ideal for 3 women sharing a room), needs more hanging space in the room for hanging wet swimwear, and the bathroom only had two spots for hanging towels but the room could accommodate 4 people. Coffee pot area was in the bathroom.

reviews.title: Glad they are updating facilities, we will be back next year to check it out again.
reviews.positives: Loved that it was on the beach! Liked having multiple restaurants to choose from right on site.
reviews.negatives: There were a lot of sea gulls around the pool area hovering right above peoples heads. One seagull took the sandwich right out of my hand that I was eating poolside. You should be able to sit and eat poolside without being worried about nuisance animals.

reviews.title: Sand key
reviews.positives: The Sheraton Sand Key Resort is serene, quiet away from crowded areas, offers a private, spacious beach perfect for families.
reviews.negatives: Have to pay fees to rent chairs on the beach the hotel does not provide them.Have to pay for parking. The bathroom is small. The pool area is small and gets very crowded. The staff is overwhelmed.

reviews.title: The hotel would have been perfect if it had not been so noisy
reviews.positives: Beautiful hotel, modern rooms, heated pool, hot tub, and several food options.
reviews.negatives: I had an adjoining room door between myself and other occupants and I could hear everything from the next room (I could even hear them using the restroom).

reviews.title: Nice and what we needed
reviews.positives: Close to what we wanted the race
reviews.negatives: Nice and clean

reviews.title: We had a good time and it was a very nice stay
reviews.positives: Location was nice. Access to the beach was great.
reviews.negatives: I did not like the fact that we had to pay for parking. The use of the jolly trolley was not very well explained. Overall, the facility could’ve been a little bit more clean and updated for the price we paid.

reviews.title: All and all, it was great!
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Could here noises from the room above me

reviews.title: It was fantastic
reviews.positives: Close to the beach.
reviews.negatives: That it did not include breakfast

reviews.title: Nice stay. They allowed me to check in early also
reviews.positives: It is a good location and the beach makes the stay
reviews.negatives: Tiny bugs near the sink, no shower gel in the shower gel bottle

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location, on the beach.  Sand key. Just a little bit away from Clearwater Beach.
reviews.negatives:
Noisy. Doors slammed near us. Needed silencer on doors. People banging on doors next door to be let in 2-4 am. 
Every time we went to pool we could not find a lounge chair or table

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Clean hotel, good size rooms, friendly staff. The location is relatively ok.
reviews.negatives: We were there right after the storm, so the private beach - which was the main reason we booked the hotel - was hard to access. The distance from the hotel's pool to the actual beach was filled with sea water and debris.I understand that the storm was the uncontrollably factor, but shouldn't the hotel have some solutions for their own private beach?

reviews.title: Good area things were close
reviews.positives: The outside area
reviews.negatives: The room was small

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Check in and out was very easy and staff were very friendly, rooms were nicely renovated, great place to watch sunsets and collect sand dollars, parking was convenient and included.  State park is next door and a great place to fish. Enjoyed musician by the pool.
reviews.negatives: Although this property is located on the beach, it is a long walk to the beach so if you forget something in your room, it is a long walk back and forth, hot tub is small.

reviews.title: The hotel did not disappoint,  this was our second time.
reviews.positives: Beautiful beach, friendly staff
reviews.negatives: Constructions. I do understand the reason.

reviews.title: Beautiful resort in a prime location and with great staff. I wish I had stayed longer than one night.
reviews.positives: The resort itself is beautiful. The location excellent and the pool adjacent to the beach was awesome. The room was so clean and the beds and pillows were extremely comfortable!
reviews.negatives: Renovations being done during our stay was begun to early and directly after an emergency being called over loud speakers. Of course, it was no one’s fault for that emergency, it was just so startling and then when we got back to the room, the noise from the construction started. ugh

reviews.title: Great view, smaller size room for price.
reviews.positives: Beautiful view of the pool and beach with balcony.
reviews.negatives: Room was small for price paid and bathrooms were old, small and outdated. Only had mini-fridge. Wish it had kitchenette and spacious bathroom for suites with gulf view.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.positives: Loved being right on the beach!
reviews.negatives: Not related to the facility itself, but it’s hard to find a place to sit near the pool due to people coming out early and saving seats. Some seats would have towels on them for most of the day with no people.

reviews.title: I would recommend it
reviews.positives: Amenities, convenience
reviews.negatives: Too far to Gulf

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location, really great area
reviews.negatives: Ongoing construction near our room

reviews.title: It was a perfect little get away
reviews.positives: It was beautiful and well taken care of. We were only there for 1 night but we had a great time and enjoyed all the amenities

reviews.title: Very comfortable stay
reviews.positives: Friendly and helpful staff
reviews.negatives: The TV in our room had volume issues. The volume would go lower or higher without using the remote.

reviews.title: Great weekend get away!!
reviews.positives: Staff was friendly and helpful. Room was comfortable and clean. Pool was cool and hot tub was hot. Beach was beautiful as Always. Rusty's Bistro was Amazing!!!  Great place for weekend Getaway!!

reviews.title: We had a wonderful time
reviews.positives: Close to the beach and with private access
reviews.negatives: The pool, too school for all the residents to enjoy

reviews.title: The resort was worth the price and the trip was exceptional in part from the hotel’s amenities.
reviews.positives: I did not have breakfast, the location was perfect for my child and family to go to the beach.
reviews.negatives: The wasn’t any real issue with the room. The view was the only thing that I wish was better.

reviews.title: We would defiantly come and stay here again
reviews.positives: Friendly staff and all the help up to our room with luggage.  The grounds were a amazing and the pool side chairs are so comfortable.  We also enjoyed eating on site, so delicious and convenient.
reviews.negatives: We hated the the automatic light that turned on in the closet!! Every time I got up to go pee in the night it would come on and stay on for 3 min and flood the room and woke the others up.  It needs to have an off switch for night time.

reviews.title: Great location, rooms, facilities and staff!
reviews.positives: The pool is very nice, loved the private beach areas, the room was very clean and nice and the A/C was phenomenal, I liked that it was a little secluded from the main strip/beach area but also close enough to easily access whatever you needed and wanted!
reviews.negatives: The pool could have a few more shaded areas around some lounge chairs to provide shade when it’s super hot and sunny!

reviews.title: It was a great place to stay and Uber will take you anywhere for an affordable price. There’s also a trolly to take for
reviews.positives: Beautiful location, friendly staff
reviews.negatives: It located in the beach but a bit far to walk if you have some difficulty walking far in soft sand.

reviews.title: It was an amazing getaway!
reviews.positives: The employees were exceptional! The pool area is very nice, kid friendly but adult friendly as well! They have a kiddie pool and a big pool and a hot tub. There was a little pool bar that had amazing service. The access to the beach was very convenient and not crowded! The food at the restaurants in the hotel were very good!
reviews.negatives: No microwave in rooms

reviews.title: Great stay!
reviews.positives: The food was amazing! Staff was very helpful! And view was amazing!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Loved the location and the private beach for sure.
reviews.negatives: The a/c wasn’t very efficient and the thermostat wouldn’t change

reviews.title: Very nice facilities in a good location
reviews.positives: Nice resort
reviews.negatives: Paying to park your car

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The beach
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Location
Views
Private beach area
reviews.negatives: Buffet breakfast

reviews.title: Super clean, comfortable with a great staff for a private florida getaway that will now be forever special for my financ
reviews.positives: i loved the location of the property, my longtime girlfriend and i got engaged while here last week! the food truck was incredible and shoutout sasha i believe her name was, she was so kind and sweet when we were ordering drinks. One of our servers recommended the crab cake from a restaurant inside and it was terrific, the private beach access was super nice and it was very peaceful.
reviews.negatives: $25 a day for parking after spending thousands for a wednesday to saturday is something i didn’t care for at all but everything else was exactly as i wanted for such a big life event we had take place at this resort! as a young couple, i really hope we can find a way to make it back here for another trip!

reviews.title: Great location and friendly staff
reviews.positives: Wet clean, inviting, friendly front desk staff, got us into our room early after our race with All Day Run big Co., room was spacious and the balcony overlooked pool and beach, convenient location to the race location (walked lit the back door on the beach to the race start).
reviews.negatives: It exceeded all our expectations

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: This place was awesome ,I have no complaints at all,we will definitely book here again....

reviews.title: It was just beautiful, with very friendly staff.
reviews.positives: It was very safe and beautiful for a single person
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything
reviews.negatives: Don’t have laundry.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Enjoyed the location.
reviews.negatives: The restaurant on the property was pricey.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything
reviews.negatives: Beach quite far from hotel but we enjoyed getting a ride with beach cart driven by hotel employees

reviews.title: We had a beautiful stay at a clean and comfortable hotel ♥️
reviews.positives: The hotel was lovely and the location was perfect. The hotel was very quiet at night and you can take the trolley into the Clearwater between 10 am and 10 pm.

reviews.title: Amazing hotel and staff. Love it!
reviews.positives: I really like everything, highly recommended.

reviews.title: Very comfortable and relaxing vacation.
reviews.positives: Loved the pool area. Staff was friendly and accommodating. Room was comfortable and loved being on first floor next to pool.
reviews.negatives: The only negative was the pillows. They were very flat.

reviews.title: Gorgeous stay with amazing views, only down part was to pay for parking in the premises
reviews.positives: I loved the pool it was so nice to sit there all day and the bar!
reviews.negatives: Paying for parking on the premises.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Clean. Staff was nice
reviews.negatives: Small pool. No breakfast included

reviews.title: It was exceptional in every way. We will be returning next year.
reviews.positives: Location, amenities, staff, cleanliness, food, cabanas on private beach, just an exceptional place from a to z!

reviews.title: Very enjoyable.
reviews.positives: Location was great

reviews.title: Perfect get away
reviews.positives: Was directly on the beach and close to every thing
reviews.negatives: There was no microwave in the room

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Clean and good service

reviews.title: lovely place to stay with nice amenities. A true resort feel great service!
reviews.positives: great location and amenities

reviews.title: No merece la pena por la calidad precio. Precio muy alto, calidad baja
reviews.positives: Limpieza bien, personal amable.
reviews.negatives: Las paredes de habitación de cartón, se oye todo como si fuera los vecinos están en tu habitación, peor si hay familias con niños al lado. Mucho ruido. Muy caro para lo que hay, Aunque estuvimos en la parte reformada. El baño muy estrecho, no podía estar ahí secarme el pelo, me ahogaba del calor con la puerta abierta.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: La playa
reviews.negatives:
Cucarachas en la habitacion 
Y en la madrugada me andaba una en eñ braso y otra en el bano

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: La playa
reviews.negatives: El hotel haciendo reparaciones . El bar de la piscina lo cierran muy temprano . Y no hay nada más que hacer . La piscina demasiado pequeña para tantos huéspedes y no muy limpia . El primer día  funcionando solo un elevador . También tuvimos interrupción de agua una tarde . En fin lo único bueno es la playa .

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Nos cobraron por el estacionamiento y es un abuso, al final hicieron un doble cobro lo cual me molestó y estoy esperando el retorno del dinero

reviews.title: Espectacular playa
reviews.positives: Camas cómodas,  acceso a playa espectacular
reviews.negatives: Te dan cortesía uso de bicicletas pero no las pudimos usar porque la.app no reconoce todos los códigos de área de los países

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Las habitaciones
reviews.negatives: Cierra todo muy temprano, no tiene vida nocturna

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La ubicación.
reviews.negatives: La limpieza y la ubicación de la habitación.

reviews.title: Buen hotel con acceso directo a una playa increible.
reviews.positives: La ubicacion del hotel que esta frente a la playa

reviews.title: Buen alojamiento.
reviews.positives: Si me gustó la ubicación y el hotel es cómodo.
reviews.negatives: El pago de estacionamiento.

reviews.title: Increible
reviews.positives: Todo muy bien ,la recepción, los empleados todos muy amables y cordiales .
reviews.negatives: Que cobraran el estacionamiento siendo huésped. De ahi en fuera todo bien

reviews.title: Un hotel para disfruta de un buen mar
reviews.positives: La limpieza en las habitaciones y el trato del personal en todas sus áreas muy bueno. El señor Hermès encargado de la limpieza en la habitación hace un servicio VIP como pocos.
reviews.negatives: La piscina muy pequeña en proporción a el tamaño del resort

reviews.title: Excelente atención de Michael en el Front Desk . Cómodas instalaciones y playa espectacular. Es caro pero tienes todo ah
reviews.positives:
Excelente ubicación. Parking gratis . 
Linda playa . Buen servicio
reviews.negatives:
Las reposeras , sillas de playa y quitasoles no están incluidos . Valor por día es de 40 dol + taxes. 
Hotel en proceso de remodelación. Ruido mínimo .

reviews.title: Divino
reviews.positives: Me encantó todo lo único es que pedí barcon frente al mar y lo menos que se ve es el mar es mejor a la piscina

reviews.title: Excelente! Maravilloso!
reviews.positives: La atención, muy diligentes y atentos!
reviews.negatives: Que no había microondas en la habitación, solo café y en la madrugada no pude comer caliente mis antojos! 😅

reviews.title: Espectacular
reviews.positives: Si, el alojamiento espectacular, el hotel está recién restaurado y todo está en excelente estado

reviews.title: Excelente hotel
reviews.positives: Todo muy limpio y excelente trato.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Excelente hotel, muy bien ubicado con acceso a la paya. Divino todo, solamente le critico el valor del alquiler de reposeras (2) y sombrilla en la playa, U$S40 me pareció mucho.
reviews.negatives: El valor del alquiler de sombrilla y reposeras en la playa, un poco caro para mí U$S 40.

reviews.title: Agradable
reviews.positives: Balcon
reviews.negatives: Todo estubo bien

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: La piscine et l'accès à la plage sont super !!
reviews.negatives:
Nous étions 3 à voyager, nous et notre fils de 5 ans. Nous avions une chambre avec un lit king size, et nous avons dû dormir à 3 dedans car si nous voulions un lit supplémentaire, nous devions payer un surplus.
Pourtant la réservation que j'avais faite était bien pour trois. Je trouve ça très moyen.

reviews.title: Hotel à recommander
reviews.positives: Chambre confortable et propre. Plage magnifique, sable blanc, mer très chaude. Un voiturier est à disposition pour vous amener au bord de l'eau.
reviews.negatives: La piscine est propre, cependant est trop petite par rapport à la grandeur de l'hôtel.

reviews.title: séjour parfait, je reviendrai
reviews.positives: la plage
reviews.negatives: rien vraiment

reviews.title: Schlechteste Preis/Leistung ever!!!
reviews.positives: Wenig. Die Pool Area ist ok. Und es gibt einen eigenen Strandbereich, der direkt hinter dem Poolbereich anfängt, von da sind es bestimmt 300 m weißer Sand bis zum Wasser. Das Frühstücksbuffet ist auch ok. Kostet allerdings 20 Dollar pro Nase extra.
reviews.negatives:
Das Hotel war eine Großbaustelle, die den kompletten Betrieb beeinträchtigt hat. Schon morgens um 06:00 Uhr ging das große Bohren, Hämmern, Sägen und Flexen los. Überall im und um das Haus waren Bauarbeiter unterwegs. Alles war entsprechend dreckig, ein Leben im Baustaub. Außer dem Pool war ALLES renovierungsbedingt geschlossen (Fitness, Sportplätze...) 
Mit der Klimatisierung wird dafür übertrieben. Lobby, Bar, Restaurant und die Konferenzräume werden auf 16 Grad gekühlt, was selbst für Kältefanatiker zu krass ist. 
Der Office-Bereich mit öffentlichen Computern ist lediglich ein Stehtisch im Eingangsbereich der Bar. Für den Preis dieses Hotels erwartet man generell in allen Bereichen ein ganz anderes Niveau, wird aber leider enttäuscht. 
Hatten direkt davor ein Hotel in Orlando, das tatsächlich besser war und dafür nur ein Drittel gekostet hat.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Sehr

reviews.title: Trotz der Umstände, war es ein sehr schöner Aufenthalt im Hotel und vor allem in Clearwater
reviews.positives: Die Lage direkt am Strand, die Lage in Clearwater Beach und das nette Personal!
reviews.negatives:
Aufgrund des Hurrikans war die komplette Poollandschaft nicht nutzbar, da die Zimmer im Erdgeschoss renoviert wurden, war es immer wieder recht laut, auch morgens schon … Meiner Meinung nach hätte sich das im Reisepreis widerspiegeln müssen! 
Auch die Preise im hoteleigenen Shop sind zumindest als grenzwertig zu bezeichnen!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Die Lage des Hotels und die Cocktails am Pool waren sehr gut
reviews.negatives: Bei Buchung wurde angegeben, dass Parkplätze kostenfrei zur Verfügung stehen und bei Ankunft mussten wir dann doch 20 Dollar pro Tag bezahlen

reviews.title: Zum dritten mal da und gern wieder
reviews.positives:
Der Stand ist ein Traum
Ruhige Lage trotzdem schnell in Clearwater beach

reviews.title: Tolles Hotel mit traumhaften Strand
reviews.positives: Wunderschöne Lage am Golf von Mexiko. Sehr gepflegte Gartenanlage mit Pool und kleiner Poolbar. Der Strand schließt sich direkt an die Hotelanlage an. Ans Wasser gelangt man zu Fuß oder mit einem Shuttle (Golfkart). Das Frühstück war hervorragend und das Personal ist aufmerksam und sehr freundlich. In einem Shop kann man Getränke, kleine Snacks und verschiedene Souveniers kaufen. Das Zentrum von Clearwater Beach ist mit dem Auto oder einem Shuttle Bus schnell erreichbar.

reviews.title: Veel te duur voor wat het is!
reviews.positives: De ligging en de toegang tot de beach. De aanwezigheid van tennisbanen. De vriendelijkheid van het personeel bij het inchecken.
reviews.negatives:
De prijs-kwaliteitverhouding is totaal verkeerd. Dit was veruit het duurste hotel op onze roadtrip (we deden er acht in totaal, waaronder gerenommeerde ketens als Omni, Hyatt en Hilton). De wifi is niet geweldig en het hotel is aan een grondige renovatie toe. Geen extra's zoals flesjes water op de kamer en ontbijt, wat voor de betaalde prijs echt wel zou moeten. Het is verwonderlijk dat de parking gratis was. De pool is vrij klein en dus overcrowded.
Maak een kamer in dit hotel de helft goedkoper en je hebt een juiste prijszetting.

reviews.title: Teleurstellend
reviews.positives: Luxe
reviews.negatives: Heel lang strand tot de zee en geen gratis strandstoelen. (48 dollars voor 2 stoelen en parasol voor 1 dag)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: booked a room for girls to shower and change and lost power. was complete waste. complained and sent email to get NO response. so poorly managed.

reviews.title: Nice location but dated
reviews.positives: Good location right on the beach plenty parking
reviews.negatives: Property is dated, a lot of facilities closed, just feels quite dated,there are a lot better and newer hotels nearby

reviews.title: It was good but I wouldn’t go back
reviews.positives: The location of the hotel
reviews.negatives: Too expensive and extra charge for everything: parking, beach chairs…

reviews.title: Nice stay but not so clean rooms
reviews.positives: The hotel has a nice swimming pool and it is on the beach. There are some restaurants inside that are quite good. Moreover, the staff was quite friendly. The hotel has a shuttle to go to the city center which is quite convenient.
reviews.negatives: The room was not very clean and we found some insects in the toilet. The price is also quite high.

reviews.title: Best beach access and nice rooms. Disappointing swimming pool experience.
reviews.positives: The room was perfect. The hotel has direct access to a quiet and beautiful area of the beach, with golf cart rides to the beach front. The hotel guests have complimentary access to the local bus to the centre of Clearwater, which  is very helpful.
reviews.negatives: The swimming pool is a bit disappointing, quite small and therefore feels really busy. The bar at the swimming pool closed earlier than advertised.

reviews.title: our home away f from hou
reviews.positives: is invitingWe habve been coming to this property for years.  The location  is great.  Staffing is always pleasant and helpul .Property looks inviting
reviews.negatives: It was explained that the hotel was going renovation.  Can't wait to see the finished product.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       construction needed to stop early evening.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The room and the beach
reviews.negatives: I do not like the pool, too small for many people.

reviews.title: it was a get away short stay with my wife. I will plan a longer one next time.
reviews.positives: I was very happy and I'm picky guys. The Staff are super nice.
reviews.negatives: I will send comments later

reviews.title: The Customer service by all members was outstanding. The parking fee needs to end -bogus!
reviews.positives: All hotel personnel were extremely courteous.  From front desk to facilities to housekeeping and entire restaurant (both) staff.  I would highly recommend (and have) Sand Key as the place to stay while in Clearwater. However please also see comments on “ dislikes”
reviews.negatives:
The parking fee for guests was totally bogus.  A 7 day stay at current room rates should be sufficient- it needs to end.
Phone did not work- the patio door lock was broken and safety bar missing.  Both curtain rod connections broke off during stay.  All Minor inconveniences however the quick response and professional manner in which all issues were addressed was impressive. In addition the closing mechanism of room doors needs adjusting-doos were constantly slamming.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Staff was wonderful and vwry helpful while we were there.
reviews.negatives: Construcción and limited rooms

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Fabulous hotel in an amazing location, the hotel is brilliantly laid out with everything easily accessible, the rooms are comfortable with a modern design and feel. We had a pool view room which gave us great views of the pool area, but also superb views of the Gulf Coast and beautiful sunsets. Easily the best hotel in Clearwater
reviews.negatives: Everything was superb

reviews.title: So amazing. I will definitely be back.
reviews.positives: The breakfast was great. Updated decor. Bed was great. Pool and beach are awesome. I love the golf cart to take us down to the beach front. It was great.
reviews.negatives: Everything was great.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Room was very clean, both restaurants had great service! Pool area was clesn, played corn hole, all in all it a great property!

reviews.title: Boa, mas poderia ter sido muito melhor. Inclusive com simpatia dos funcionários, para quem não fala inglês fluente.
reviews.positives: As camas, travesseiros, lençóis, bons. A poltrona, cafeteira e frigobar ok.
reviews.negatives: No banheiro não tinham enchido os reservatórios de sabonete e o de shampoo estava com problema na tampa. O ar condicionado faz um barulho significativo.

reviews.title: Não tem suporte para família com bebê
reviews.positives: Localização ótima
reviews.negatives: Não tinha microondas e nenhum lugar do hotel, precisava esquentar comida para minha bebê e a front desk não quis nem saber pq eu precisava do microondas, simplesmente falou que não tinha!

reviews.title: Muito boa, para ser maravilhosa somente alguns detalhes.
reviews.positives: Mobílias novas, bem cuidadas.
reviews.negatives: Reposição do sabonete líquido, deixou a desejar.

reviews.title: Bom hotel
reviews.positives: O quarto grande, cama confortavél, o hotel oferece serviço com carrinho de golf para levar o hospede até perto do mar. Lindo por do sol em frente ao hotel. Boa academia com equipamentos novos. Oferece maquina de lavar e secar com pagamento em moedas, tem maquinas de gelo nos andares. O hotel esta em uma praia calma longe do agito da cidade, o agito esta 10 min de carro.
reviews.negatives: É necessario pagar por cadeiras e guarda sol na praia proximo ao mar. A quadra de tenis esta interditada até terminar reforma/manutenção do prédio. Achei o menu do restaurante um pouco limitado.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Bem limpo e bem servido e localizado

reviews.title: Excelente localização! Bons serviços e cordialidade dos funcionários.
reviews.positives: Tudo estava perfeito!!

reviews.title: Foi muito bom deu pra aproveitar bem o unico dia que tinhamos em clearwater
reviews.positives: Hotel tranquilo, cama muito boa, piscina e acesso a praia!!

reviews.title: muy linda estadía
reviews.positives: la piscina y la playa
reviews.negatives: nada
